title: oberonia dubia
intro: Oberonia dubia, also known as the lesser orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its roots are known to possess medicinal properties due to their high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Oberonia dubia is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Oberonia dubia are often made into teas, infusions, or tonics, and are used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections, digestive problems, and respiratory diseases.
